title: Potion Rings
description: Adds new rings giving permanent potion effects
body:
# Potion Rings
This mod adds new rings to the game which can be crafted with netherite and a potion of your choice. The ring can then be added to a curios ring slot and will give the effect of the potion that was used to craft it


## Effects

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Through survival only potions with durations can be crafted into rings however instant effects are available through commands.
The rings amplifier will be based on the potion used to craft for example:
If crafted with swiftness II then a swiftness II ring will be made
If crafted with swiftness I then a swiftness I ring will be made

</details>


## Crafting

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Potion in middle of crafting table surrounded by 8 Netherite Ingots](https://i.imgur.com/uJ5JaUO.png)

</details>




## Mod Support

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod should work with potions added from other mods (although this is untested). Rings made using non-vanilla potions will simply have the name "Enchanted Ring".

</details>


![Showcase of some of the new rings](https://i.imgur.com/vPbUYwf.png)
